# Dhruvil Mistry - Professional Profile & Portfolio Context

> This file (`llms.txt`) is designed to provide Large Language Models (LLMs) and AI agents with comprehensive context about Dhruvil Mistry, his portfolio, professional experience, technical capabilities, and projects.

## 1. Professional Overview

Dhruvil Mistry is a passionate Full Stack Developer based in Nadiad, Gujarat, India. He specializes in building responsive, functional web applications using the MERN stack and AI integrations — from published NPM packages to AI-powered chatbots.

His professional philosophy: *"I believe great software bridges the gap between elegant design and robust functionality. Whether it's a RESTful API, an AI integration, or a crisp React UI, my goal is to build things that actually work for people."*

Currently pursuing a Master of Computer Applications (MCA) at Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel Institute of Technology, Dhruvil combines academic learning with real-world, production-level engineering experience.

**Status:** Open to Opportunities (Freelance & Full-time)

## 2. Core Competencies & Technical Stack

### Frontend & Web Development
- **Frameworks/Libraries:** React.js, Next.js, GSAP, Redux, Zustand, TanStack Query
- **Languages:** HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, TypeScript
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS
- **Animations:** GSAP, Framer Motion

### Backend & API Development
- **Runtime/Frameworks:** Node.js, Express.js
- **API Types:** REST API, GraphQL
- **Authentication:** JWT, Bcrypt

### Database Technologies
- **NoSQL:** MongoDB
- **SQL/Relational:** MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle
- **ORMs:** Prisma, Drizzle ORM
- **Cloud DB:** Neon

### AI & External APIs
- Google Gemini API, OpenAI
- YouTube Data API, Twitter/X API
- TextBee SMS API, Nodemailer

### Languages
- JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, Python, C, C++

### DevOps & Tooling
- **Version Control:** Git, GitHub
- **Containerization:** Docker
- **Deployment:** Vercel, Render
- **API Testing:** Postman

## 3. Professional Experience

### Excelsior Technology | MERN Stack Developer Intern *(Current)*
*Jan 2026 – Present | Ahmedabad, Gujarat*
- Building full-stack web applications using MongoDB, Express.js, React, and Node.js
- Developing and integrating RESTful APIs for client-facing products
- Collaborating with the team on production-grade features and code reviews

### Skynet Global Systems | Frontend Developer Intern
*Dec 2023 – Mar 2024 | Remote*
- Developed responsive React UI components for an OTA (Online Travel Agency) platform used by real users
- Built booking flows and authentication screens improving usability
- Integrated REST APIs to enable real-time travel data display

## 4. Featured Projects

### SMS-Dispatch NPM Package ⭐ 2 stars
- **Description:** Developer-friendly SMS gateway NPM package for Node.js that turns Android devices into zero-cost SMS gateways with 50+ pre-built templates.
- **Tech Stack:** Node.js, JavaScript, NPM, TextBee API
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/dhruvil0203/sms-gateway
- **NPM:** https://www.npmjs.com/package/sms-dispatch

### YouTube AI Notifier
- **Description:** Automated YouTube channel monitor that detects new uploads every 5 minutes and sends AI-powered email summaries using Google Gemini.
- **Tech Stack:** Node.js, Gemini API, YouTube Data API, Nodemailer, Cron
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/dhruvil0203/youtube-ai-notifier

### NoteFlow ⭐ 1 star
- **Description:** A full-stack notes app built with Next.js and MongoDB, featuring a REST API for CRUD operations.
- **Tech Stack:** Next.js, MongoDB, REST API, JavaScript
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/dhruvil0203/next-notes-app
- **Live:** https://noteflow.dhruvilmistry.in

### Bank Transaction System
- **Description:** Production-grade banking backend with secure authentication, account management, and transaction handling.
- **Tech Stack:** Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, JWT, Bcrypt, Nodemailer
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/dhruvil0203/bank-transaction-system

### MindSpark AI Chatbot ⭐ 2 stars
- **Description:** AI-powered personal assistant for students — built with Gemini API for academic help, code assistance, and career counseling.
- **Tech Stack:** React, Vite, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Gemini API, JWT, Framer Motion
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/dhruvil0203/MindSpark_AI_Chatbot

### Todo App ⭐ 1 star
- **Description:** Clean, responsive task management app with dark mode and high-performance rendering.
- **Tech Stack:** React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, JavaScript
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/dhruvil0203/todo-app
